def negative_python_perf_layer_database_access_count_then_fetch_every_page():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_database_access_count_then_fetch_every_page"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Database access. Flag count queries paired with every paginated fetch without product need or caching."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
